title: Label 309 Merkle list commitment
description: A single Merkle list-commitment entry: a CLOSED CBOR map `{alg, root, leaf_count, ? uris}` binding the record to an ordered leaf list via a registered list-commitment algorithm. `root` is the 32-byte commitment root (hex string). `leaf_count` is a CBOR unsigned integer in 1 .. 2^32 − 1 (a zero or out-of-range value is SCHEMA_MERKLE_LEAF_COUNT_INVALID); it binds the on-chain commitment to the off-chain leaves-list size (a disagreement with the fetched leaves-list is SCHEMA_MERKLE_LEAF_COUNT_MISMATCH). `uris` (optional) is a non-empty array of absolute URIs, each one text string, locating the leaves-list document; an entry that omits it denotes a producer-only commitment with no public leaf list. STRUCTURAL only: `alg` registry membership (UNSUPPORTED_MERKLE_COMMIT_ALG; the list-commitment registry is disjoint from the content-hash registry), URI shape (INVALID_URI), and root recomputation are domain-pass / verifier checks. The map is closed: unknown keys are rejected.
